title: YOLO Signals Manual Ground Truth
subtitle: Manual YOLO bounding boxes for TurtleBot signal detection
description: Manual YOLO detection dataset built from turtlebot/labels-gt. Contains images and YOLO txt labels for 4 classes: left-arrow, right-arrow, stop-signal, and meta. Current packaged state: 506 labeled images, including 48 rotated stop-signal-inverted source images labeled as stop-signal, with 404 train images and 102 validation images.
